title: cephaelis bubalina
intro: Cephaelis bubalina, also known as the Wild Sarsaparilla, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cephaelis bubalina include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its use in reducing fever and relieving joint pain. Cephaelis bubalina is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or ointment, and can be used externally to promote wound healing and skin health.
